results.input_question: Which Colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used a multikinase inhibitor as a control?

decomposed_queries: {"decomposed_queries": ["Which trials have Cancer type = 'Colorectal'?", "Which trials have Number of arms >= 3?", "Which trials have Control regimen containing 'multikinase inhibitor'?"]}

retrieval_trace.decomposed_query: {"decomposed_queries": ["Which trials have Cancer type = 'Colorectal'?", "Which trials have Number of arms >= 3?", "Which trials have Control regimen containing 'multikinase inhibitor'?"]}

candidate.question: Which trials have Cancer type = 'Breast cancer', Control arm = 'Chemo/TKI', and Number of arms >= 4?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Breast cancer' AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo/TKI' AND "Number of arms" >= 4;
candidate.parent_question: Which breast cancer trials used chemotherapy or a tyrosine kinase inhibitor as a control and had at least 4 arms?

candidate.question: Retrieve NCT, Author, Year, Originial publication or Follow-up, Trial phase, Control arm, Cancer type, and Treatment regimen for trials where Trial phase = 'Phase 2'.
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2';
candidate.parent_question: Find phase 2 clinical trials for Urothelial cancer that compared immunotherapy to anti-VEGF therapy?

candidate.question: Which trials satisfy Name of ICI = Atezolizumab AND Cancer type = Colorectal AND Control arm = Multikinase inhibitor?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Atezolizumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials of Atezolizumab for Colorectal cancer used a multikinase inhibitor as the control?

synthesized.raw_text: SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Cancer type", "Number of arms", "Control regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 3 AND "Control regimen" LIKE '%multikinase inhibitor%';
synthesized.final_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Cancer type", "Number of arms", "Control regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 3 AND "Control regimen" LIKE '%multikinase inhibitor%';
